creator: chopra@runbox.com
text:
On Mon, Jul 09, 2001 at 05:33:07PM +0300, Peter Pentchev wrote:
> 
> I see that David has already taken this PR up, but a little comment,
> if I may.  Beta versions are usually indicated by something like
> 3.b89 or 3.89.b; 3.89beta is not an acceptable version name for
> pkg_version(1)-style comparisons.  Something like the following..
> 
> Index: ports/audio/lame/Makefile
> ===================================================================
> RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/audio/lame/Makefile,v
> retrieving revision 1.18
> diff -u -r1.18 Makefile
> --- ports/audio/lame/Makefile	2001/01/08 00:54:29	1.18
> +++ ports/audio/lame/Makefile	2001/07/09 14:28:08
> @@ -6,13 +6,12 @@
>  #
>  
>  PORTNAME=	lame
> -PORTVERSION=	3.70
> -PORTREVISION=	2
> +PORTVERSION=	3.89.b
>  CATEGORIES=	audio
>  MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE} \
>  		ftp://lame.sourceforge.net/pub/
>  MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	lame/src
> -DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION}
> +DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION:S/.b$/beta/}
>  
>  MAINTAINER=	yoshiaki@kt.rim.or.jp
> 
> This also takes care of removing the PORTREVISION setting, which
> is not needed when PORTVERSION is bumped up.
>  

Ahh, I didn't know that. I'll try to remember this next time. 

-- 
-Munish
